creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
With bug 261773 fixed in February 2022, I wonder whether what remains here is a mixture of reports …


(In reply to Peter Much from comment #19)

> … no further interaction is possible, 

If things seem stuck at ttyv0, then does e.g. Alt-F3 followed by Alt-F2 have any effect?


> hard poweroff necessary, …

Try this in your /etc/sysctl.conf

hw.acpi.power_button_state="S5"

– then restart the computer, and next time things seem stuck: try a _short_ press on the power button (not so hard).
